mapper.select: select distinct m.perms from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id left join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where m.status = 1 and m.deleted = 0 and r.status = 1 and r.deleted = 0 and ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.perms is not null and m.perms != ''

select distinct m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms,'') as perms, m.is_frame, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.sort, m.create_time from sys_menu m left join sys_role_menu rm on m.id = rm.menu_id left join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id left join sys_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') and m.status = 1 and m.deleted = 0 and r.status = 1 and r.deleted = 0 and ur.user_id = #{userId} order by m.parent_id, m.sort
